articles.title: The World Cup was great, but Boston still doesn’t need the Olympics
articles.description:
Plus: Three of the top five World Cup scorers are still playing — can you name the other two?

The post The World Cup was great, but Boston still doesn’t need the Olympics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston residents express skepticism about hosting the Olympics despite World Cup success.
Three of the top five World Cup scorers are still active players.
Concerns about costs and infrastructure persist among Boston locals regarding the Olympics.

articles.title: Bill Belichick’s daughter-in-law wanted for arrest in North Carolina after traffic stop
articles.description:
Jen Belichick, who was cited for speeding, reportedly did not show up for a court-ordered appearance in front of a judge.

The post Bill Belichick’s daughter-in-law wanted for arrest in North Carolina after traffic stop appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jen Belichick cited for speeding in North Carolina, failed to appear in court.
Traffic stop occurred after a reported speeding incident; warrant issued for her arrest.
Potential legal repercussions may affect the Belichick family's public image in Boston.
